mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FEEDBACK (workout_id, meal_id, inbody_id, feedback_date, summary, comment, next_comment, trainer_id) VALUES (#{workoutId}, #{mealId}, #{inbodyId}, #{feedbackDate}, #{summary}, #{comment}, #{nextComment}, #{trainerId})
mapper.select: SELECT id, workout_id, meal_id, inbody_id, feedback_date, summary, comment, next_comment, trainer_id FROM FEEDBACK WHERE trainer_id = #{trainerId} ORDER BY feedback_date DESC
SELECT id, workout_id, meal_id, inbody_id, feedback_date, summary, comment, next_comment, trainer_id FROM FEEDBACK WHERE workout_id = #{workoutId} ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT f.id, f.workout_id, f.meal_id, f.inbody_id, f.feedback_date, f.summary, f.comment, f.next_comment, f.trainer_id FROM FEEDBACK f JOIN WORKOUT_LOG wl ON f.workout_id = wl.id WHERE wl.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY f.feedback_date DESC
